tabled_reason: EPM-only. PlanningBudgets is an Oracle EPM Cloud (EPBCS / Planning and Budgeting) integration, not a Fusion ERP FBDI object. It has no ERP Integration SOAP loadAndImportData path, no UCM DocumentAccount, and no ESS import job on this Fusion ERP demo pod. It cannot be live-proven to a Fusion ERP base table because the destination is an Essbase planning cube in a separate EPM Cloud pod that this demo instance does not subscribe to.

mechanism_finding.what_it_is: EPBCS planning/budget data load (Enterprise Planning and Budgeting Cloud Service).
mechanism_finding.generator_evidence: db/packages/dmt_plan_budget_fbdi_gen_pkg.pkb.sql emits a single member EpbcsDataImport.csv with EPM dimension columns SCENARIO, VERSION, ENTITY, ACCOUNT, PERIOD, AMOUNT, CURRENCY, DATA_LOAD_DEFINITION_NAME, ATTRIBUTE1..5 -- an EPM Data Management / Data Integration load format, NOT a Fusion ERP FBDI interface CSV.
mechanism_finding.load_channel: Oracle EPM Cloud Data Management / Data Integration (a Data Load Definition run inside the EPM pod), or the EPM REST 'Import Data' job. Not the Fusion ERP ErpIntegrationService.
mechanism_finding.not_gl_budgets: Distinct from GLBudgets (opts id 17, GL_BUDGET_INTERFACE, ValidateAndLoadBudgets) and ProjectBudgets (opts id 39, PjoPlanVersionsXface.csv, ImportBudgetsInterfaceData) -- both of which ARE Fusion ERP FBDI and are handled by their own objects.

evidence.no_interface_options_row: db/seed/dmt_erp_interface_options_tbl.sql has NO row whose CEMLI_CODE / BUSINESS_OBJECT / UCM_ACCOUNT is PlanningBudgets or EPBCS. grep for PlanningBudget|EpbcsData|epbcs returns nothing. GL and Project budget rows exist (ids 17, 39, 51, 78, 79, 153) but none is EPBCS.
evidence.no_fbdi_metadata_row: db/seed/dmt_upload_fbdi_metadata.sql maps no object_code to EpbcsDataImport.csv.
evidence.cemli_catalog_out_of_scope: db/seed/dmt_cemli_catalog_tbl.sql line 7: 'PlanningBudgets is out of scope (2026-07-07) and is not seeded.'
evidence.object_readme: objects/PlanningBudgets/README.md status = DORMANT (EPBCS table not accessible on demo instance).
evidence.pod_probe_read_only: Read-only BIP: ESS_REQUEST_HISTORY has ZERO runs whose name/definition mentions EPBCS or Planning Budget; the 124 budget-named runs are all GL/Project ERP-FBDI budget jobs. gl_budget_interface is reachable (ERP), confirming this is a Fusion ERP pod with no EPM/EPBCS registration.
evidence.web: Oracle EPM budget/planning data loads go through EPM Data Management/Data Integration (EPM Cloud), replacing FDMEE; ERP FBDI is for ERP/SCM objects only.

revisit_if: This pod (or a client pod) subscribes to Oracle EPM Cloud (Planning/EPBCS) AND exposes a Data Load Definition or the EPM 'Import Data' REST job with a readable planning cube. Only then can EpbcsDataImport.csv be loaded and a good/bad row proven to the planning cube. On a pure Fusion ERP demo, there is no base table to prove to.
